mapper.select:
SELECT id, name, gender, phone, hire_date FROM salespeople
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY id
SELECT id, name, gender, phone, hire_date FROM salespeople WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO salespeople (name, gender, phone, hire_date) VALUES (#{name}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{hireDate})
mapper.update: UPDATE salespeople SET name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, phone = #{phone}, hire_date = #{hireDate} WHERE id = #{id}
